Annual Report

MAIN CONTENT
The Reserve Bank of India has issued a notification regarding updated KYC norms for all scheduled commercial banks.

This notification supersedes the previous circular DBR.AML.BC.No.81/14.01.001/2015-16 dated February 25, 2016.

Key changes include:
1. Enhanced due diligence for high-risk customers
2. Mandatory Aadhaar verification for individual accounts
3. Video KYC permitted for remote onboarding
4. Periodic updation of KYC records every 2 years

Reference: RBI/2024-25/DBR.AML.BC.No.23/14.01.001/2024-25
Date: 15 January 2024

FOOTER
Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Mumbai
